channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Flipboard’s new app is a discovery engine for the decentralized web
item.description: Fourteen years ago, when the iPad was new and bursting with unfulfilled promise, an app called Flipboard debuted.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: 4 gains Big Tech is hoping for in Trump’s second term
item.description: In a string of visits, dinners, calls, monetary pledges, and social media overtures, big tech chiefs—including Apple’s Tim Cook, OpenAI’s Sam Altman, Meta’s Mark Zuckerberg, SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son, and Amazon’s Jeff Bezos—have joined a parade of business and world leaders in trying to improve thei
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Supreme Court takes up challenge to TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court announced it will take up whether a law that could ban TikTok nationwide violates the First Amendment, setting the stage for a fast-paced, high-stakes battle over free speech. In an order issued Wednesday, the court said it will hold oral arguments Jan.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Ride the AI wave: Learn to flow
item.description: According to Gallup’s 2024 “State of the Global Workplace Report,” 85% of employees worldwide are disengaged.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump backs dockworkers as costly strike looms before inauguration
item.description: President-elect Trump has thrown his weight behind dockworkers’ demands for automation protections, as he braces for a strike that could significantly disrupt the economy just days before he is set to take office.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Calm down everyone, Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse's directors reveal doesn't mean what you think it does
item.description: One of Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse's producers has addressed fan concerns over its development after a recent directing team announcement.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: 4 key concepts for Rust beginners
item.description: Few languages are as highly esteemed by developers as Rust, which promises robust memory safety without compromising speed. Rust also has a steep learning curve, though, and some of its programming concepts can feel like a barrier to knowing it well.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Oreo maker is using AI to develop new snack flavors
item.description: There’s been no shortage of unique Oreo flavors in the past few years. The offerings seen on store shelves in recent months include toffee crunch, birthday cake, java chip, dirt cake, mint, Coca-Cola, and a pink-and-blue concoction called Space Dunk.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: A new neutrino detector in China aims to spot mysterious ghost particles lurking around us
item.description: Scientists in China have almost finished building a massive underground detector to sniff out mysterious particles called neutrinos.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan And Ng Han Guan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies
item.description: The federal government is facing a massive tech talent shortage, particularly as the development and use of AI continues to gain traction. The post The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools
item.description: EPA's CIO says modernized tools and integrated teams help the agency meet the changing needs of the public more easily and consistently. The post EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Tech consultant found guilty of second-degree murder in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: A San Francisco jury has found a tech consultant is guilty of second-degree murder in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee.
item.dc:creator: Janie Har, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Warren asks for conflict-of-interest rules covering Musk
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) is expressing her concerns about apparent conflicts of interest posed by Elon Musk serving as a top adviser in the new administration and asking for President-elect Trump to explain what ethics standards will apply to the billionaire businessman.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: Gemini Code Assist tools target developer productivity from within IDEs
item.description: Google has launched new Gemini Code Assist tools that are designed to help developers improve their productivity from within an integrated development environment (IDE), such as Visual Studio Code or JetBrains.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: House task force releases sweeping end-of-year report on AI
item.description: The House Task Force on Artificial Intelligence (AI) released its sweeping end-of-year report Tuesday, laying out a roadmap for Congress as it crafts policy surrounding the advancing technology. The 253-page report takes a deep dive into how the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: John Kirby drone statement 'very misleading at best': New Jersey rep
item.description: Rep. Chris Smith (R- N.J.) slammed White House national security spokesperson John Kirby’s statement about the recent mysterious drone sightings on the East Coast. “Well, I think it's very misleading at best," Smith said in an interview on NewsNation's "The Hill" on Monday evening.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Aerospike Vector Search adds self-healing live indexes
item.description: Real-time database provider Aerospike has updated its Aerospike Vector Search database extension for powering generative AI applications. The update offers new indexing and storage capabilities for real-time accuracy, scalability, and ease of use for developers, Aerospike said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 6 sneaky scams that could ruin your holiday season
item.description: Beware of these six sneaky holiday scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives you tips to avoid falling victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 18 indispensable Android travel apps
item.description: For all the ways travel’s evolved over the years, one thing has remained maddeningly steadfast: Moving from one place to another is almost always a hassle. There’s endless room for inconvenience and error, and a journey rarely goes according to plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft introduces Phi-4, an AI model for advanced reasoning tasks
item.description: Microsoft has announced Phi-4 — a new AI model with 14 billion parameters — designed for complex reasoning tasks, including mathematics. Phi-4 excels in areas such as STEM question-answering and advanced problem-solving, surpassing similar models in performance.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Visual Studio Code adds overtype mode, paste with imports
item.description: Visual Studio Code 1.96, the latest version of Microsoft’s popular code editor, has arrived with an overtype mode and a “paste with imports” feature for JavaScript and TypeScript.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KRON4
